item.name: Extract all text from reference document

request.name: Extract all text from reference document

description.content: Get all the text (lines) for a reference document as standardized output. The output is an array of pages with metadata such as text positioning. If you specify a configuration, Sensible uses preprocessors defined in the configuration to process the text.

Manage reference PDFs associated with document types. Create, list, fetch, update, and delete reference documents; associate or unassociate them with configurations; extract all text (lines) from a reference document.

 Name: Sensible
